sections.title: Before Between a Rock..., when quest requirements are not met

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello!

lines.speaker: Dondakan the Dwarf
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I said hello!

lines.speaker: Dondakan the Dwarf
lines.text: Hello!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who are you?

lines.speaker: Dondakan the Dwarf
lines.text: Why, I'm Dondakan, of course!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why are you firing a cannon at a wall?

lines.speaker: Dondakan the Dwarf
lines.text: I can't tell you!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why not?

lines.speaker: Dondakan the Dwarf
lines.text: You're a human! This is a dwarven thing!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Isn't there anything I can do that will make you tell me?

lines.speaker: Dondakan the Dwarf
lines.text: Perhaps if you were to help some of my fellow dwarves...

lines.speaker: Dondakan the Dwarf
lines.text: I hear there is a fishing competition that a few of my distant kinsmen are keen on winning, for instance.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: A fishing competition? What are dwarves doing in a fishing competition?

lines.speaker: Dondakan the Dwarf
lines.text: They're not in it! They can't fish if their lives depended on it!

lines.speaker: Dondakan the Dwarf
lines.text: That's where you come in! Run along now!

lines.speaker: Dondakan the Dwarf
lines.text: Well... you are the Fishing Champion... but I still can't really speak about this.

lines.speaker: Dondakan the Dwarf
lines.text: The cannon is a top-secret dwarven project, you know.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Doesn't look very secret to me, standing out there in the open.

lines.speaker: Dondakan the Dwarf
lines.text: Being cheeky eh?

lines.speaker: Dondakan the Dwarf
lines.text: Maybe you should speak to Lawgof, the Commander of the Black Guard in Kandarin.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Bit noisy here, isn't it?

lines.speaker: Dondakan the Dwarf
lines.text: Cozy? No, not really, it's damp and cold!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No! I said it's noisy!

lines.speaker: Dondakan the Dwarf
lines.text: Then stop shouting!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Goodbye!

lines.speaker: Dondakan the Dwarf
lines.text: I don't want anything from you right now.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How are you doing, Dondakan?

lines.speaker: Dondakan the Dwarf
lines.text: Oh, just fine, just fine! This gold is certainly creating a steady flow of income for me! After the company takes some of the cut, of course.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you shoot me into the rock again?

lines.speaker: Dondakan the Dwarf
lines.text: You need to wear that golden helmet... unless you want to crack open your skull on the rock.

lines.speaker: Dondakan the Dwarf
lines.text: Of course, just a second, let me adjust my cannon again.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Say, are you selling those boots of yours?

lines.speaker: Dondakan the Dwarf
lines.text: What, you mean these granite boots?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, I'd be happy to pay quite some money for them!

lines.speaker: Dondakan the Dwarf
lines.text: Haha, I bet you would, I bet you would!

lines.speaker: Dondakan the Dwarf
lines.text: But I no longer need the money, this rock is generating plenty!

lines.speaker: Dondakan the Dwarf
lines.text: Besides, I'm rather fond of them now... best boots I ever had!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh please...

lines.speaker: Dondakan the Dwarf
lines.text: No, I won't sell them.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Pretty please?

lines.speaker: Dondakan the Dwarf
lines.text: No!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh come on!!!

lines.speaker: Dondakan the Dwarf
lines.text: Well...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes?

lines.speaker: Dondakan the Dwarf
lines.text: How much gold would you be willing to pay for it? Not that I'm selling my boots, mind, I'm just curious.

lines.speaker: Dondakan the Dwarf
lines.text: What, are you trying to scam old Dondakan? You want me to sell these boots for a measly [number] coins?

lines.speaker: Dondakan the Dwarf
lines.text: I'm not selling them anyway.

lines.speaker: Dondakan the Dwarf
lines.text: You're so poor, you don't even have that much gold on you...

lines.speaker: Dondakan the Dwarf
lines.text: If I were selling my granite boots, which I'm clearly not, I would certainly not accept a mere [number] coins for them.

lines.speaker: Dondakan the Dwarf
lines.text: That's quite a sum of money, which I notice you don't even have on you.

lines.speaker: Dondakan the Dwarf
lines.text: Haha, nice try [player name]!

lines.speaker: Dondakan the Dwarf
lines.text: Pity I'm not selling my boots, not for any price or any item.

lines.speaker: Dondakan the Dwarf
lines.text: I just wanted to see how high you would go!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Bah, thanks a lot.

lines.speaker: Dondakan the Dwarf
lines.text: Hey, that's quite a bit of money. Which you don't have on you. Oh well, I wasn't selling my boots anyway.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Never mind, I don't want them anymore.

lines.speaker: Dondakan the Dwarf
lines.text: Great, because I don't want to sell them.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay.

lines.speaker: Dondakan the Dwarf
lines.text: Right.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Check these out.

lines.speaker: Dondakan the Dwarf
lines.text: Where'd you get those from? Did you make your own?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Not quite, they were retrieved from the corpse of a wyvern.

lines.speaker: Dondakan the Dwarf
lines.text: You killed a wyvern? Last I heard they were all dead.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I never said I killed it! But perhaps I did, I am a grand adventure after all!

lines.speaker: Dondakan the Dwarf
lines.text: Oh dear, oh dear. It seems firing you head first into a rock was perhaps not the best idea, you've gone absolutely loony.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hmm, well you do have a point...

lines.speaker: Dondakan the Dwarf
lines.text: It's alright Laddie, I'm just joking.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's great, but I have to go now.

lines.speaker: Dondakan the Dwarf
lines.text: Come back any time!
